snippets.C0013:
# Caso: Formatear segundos a hh:mm:ss | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Utilidades

def solve(total_seconds)
  s = [total_seconds.to_i, 0].max
  h = s / 3600
  m = (s % 3600) / 60
  sec = s % 60
  format('%02d:%02d:%02d', h, m, sec)
end
snippets.C0014:
# Caso: Validar paréntesis/corchetes/llaves | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Stacks

def solve(s)
  st = []
  pairs = {')'=>'(', ']'=>'[', '}'=>'{'}
  s.each_char do |ch|
    if "([{".include?(ch)
      st << ch
    elsif ")]}").include?(ch)
      top = st.pop
      return false if top != pairs[ch]
    end
  end
  st.empty?
end

snippets.C0018:
# Caso: Eliminar duplicados | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

def solve(arr)
  seen = {}
  out = []
  arr.each do |x|
    next if seen[x]
    seen[x] = true
    out << x
  end
  out
end
snippets.C0019:
# Caso: Rotar arreglo k | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

def solve(arr, k)
  n = arr.length
  return [] if n == 0
  r = k % n
  arr[-r, r] + arr[0, n - r]
end
snippets.C0021:
# Caso: Búsqueda binaria | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Búsqueda

def solve(arr, target)
  lo=0; hi=arr.length-1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo+hi)/2
    return mid if arr[mid] == target
    if arr[mid] < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end
snippets.C0022:
# Caso: Bubble sort | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Ordenamiento

def solve(arr)
  a = arr.dup
  n = a.length
  n.times do |i|
    (0...(n-1-i)).each do |j|
      a[j], a[j+1] = a[j+1], a[j] if a[j] > a[j+1]
    end
  end
  a
end

# Caso: Bubble sort (caso #1) | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

def solve(arr)
  a = arr.dup
  n = a.length
  n.times do |i|

snippets.C0386:
# Caso: Búsqueda binaria (caso #5) | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

def solve(arr, target)
  lo=0; hi=arr.length-1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo+hi)/2
    return mid if arr[mid] == target
    if arr[mid] < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end

# Caso: FizzBuzz | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def solve(n)
  out=[]
  (1..n).each do |i|
    s=''
    s += 'Fizz' if i % 3 == 0
    s += 'Buzz' if i % 5 == 0
    out << (s.empty? ? i.to_s : s)
  end
  out
end

snippets.C0625:
# Caso: MCD (Euclides) | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def solve(a,b)
  a=a.abs; b=b.abs
  while b!=0
    a,b=b,a%b
  end
  a
end
snippets.C0626:
# Caso: MCM | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def gcd(a,b)
  a=a.abs; b=b.abs
  while b!=0
    a,b=b,a%b
  end
  a
end

def solve(a,b)
  return 0 if a==0 || b==0
  a=a.abs; b=b.abs
  (a / gcd(a,b)) * b
end
snippets.C0627:
# Caso: ¿Es primo? | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def solve(n)
  return false if n < 2
  return true if n == 2
  return false if n.even?
  i=3
  while i*i <= n
    return false if n % i == 0
    i += 2
  end
  true
end

snippets.D0001:
# Caso: Crear base de datos | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# Ruby (pg) - ejemplo. gem install pg
# Env: DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db
require 'pg'

def solve
  conn = PG.connect(ENV['DATABASE_URL'])
  conn.exec(<<~SQL)
CREATE DATABASE demo_db;
SQL
ensure
  conn&.close
end
snippets.D0002:
# Caso: Crear tabla | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# Ruby (pg) - ejemplo. gem install pg
# Env: DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db
require 'pg'

def solve
  conn = PG.connect(ENV['DATABASE_URL'])
  conn.exec(<<~SQL)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  name text NOT NULL,
  email text NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
SQL
ensure
  conn&.close
end

snippets.D0004:
# Caso: Actualizar registro | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# Ruby (pg) - ejemplo. gem install pg
# Env: DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db

snippets.D0007:
# Caso: Join básico | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Base de datos
# Ruby (pg) - ejemplo. gem install pg
# Env: DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db
require 'pg'

def solve
  conn = PG.connect(ENV['DATABASE_URL'])
  conn.exec(<<~SQL)
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
SQL
ensure
  conn&.close
end

snippets.C0646:
# Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
def solve(rut)
  clean = rut.to_s.gsub(/[.\-\s]/, '').upcase
  return false if clean.length < 2

  body = clean[0...-1]
  dv = clean[-1]

  return false unless body.match?(/^\d+$/)

  sum = 0
  mul = 2
  body.chars.reverse_each do |ch|
    sum += (ch.ord - '0'.ord) * mul
    mul = (mul == 7) ? 2 : (mul + 1)
  end

  mod = 11 - (sum % 11)
  dv_calc = (mod == 11) ? '0' : (mod == 10) ? 'K' : mod.to_s
  dv == dv_calc
end

snippets.C0650:
# C0650 · Leer/Escribir CSV (UTF-8) (Intermedio, IO)
require "csv"

# Normaliza columna "Email" a lower-case y escribe output.csv
def solve
  in_path = "input.csv"
  out_path = "output.csv"
  rows = CSV.table(in_path)
  if rows.headers.map(&:to_s).include?("Email")
    rows.each { |r| r[:Email] = r[:Email].to_s.strip.downcase }
  end
  CSV.open(out_path, "w") do |csv|
    csv << rows.headers
    rows.each { |r| csv << rows.headers.map { |h| r[h] } }
  end
end
snippets.C0651:
# C0651 · Consumir API HTTP (GET y POST JSON) (Intermedio, HTTP)
require "net/http"
require "json"
require "uri"

def solve
  # GET
  uri = URI("https://httpbin.org/get")
  res = Net::HTTP.get_response(uri)
  get_json = JSON.parse(res.body)

  # POST JSON
  uri2 = URI("https://httpbin.org/post")
  req = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri2)
  req["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
  req.body = { hello: "world" }.to_json
  res2 = Net::HTTP.start(uri2.host, uri2.port, use_ssl: true){|http| http.request(req) }
  post_json = JSON.parse(res2.body)

  { get: get_json, post: post_json }
end

require "bcrypt"

def solve(password)
  hash = BCrypt::Password.create(password, cost: 12)
  ok = BCrypt::Password.new(hash) == password
  { hash: hash.to_s, ok: ok }
end
snippets.C0654:
# C0654 · JWT: crear y validar (Intermedio, Seguridad)
# Ruby · jwt
# gem install jwt
require "jwt"

def solve
  secret = "supersecret"
  payload = { "sub"=>"123", "iat"=>Time.now.to_i, "exp"=>(Time.now + 7200).to_i }
  token = JWT.encode(payload, secret, "HS256")
  decoded, _ = JWT.decode(token, secret, true, { algorithm: "HS256" })
  { jwt: token, payload: decoded }
end
snippets.C0655:
# C0655 · Fecha/hora y zonas (UTC ↔ America/Santiago) (Intermedio, Fechas)
# Ruby · tzinfo
# gem install tzinfo
require "tzinfo"
require "time"

def solve
  tz = TZInfo::Timezone.get("America/Santiago")
  utc = Time.parse("2026-03-03T12:00:00Z").utc
  local = tz.utc_to_local(utc)
  back = tz.local_to_utc(local)
  { utc: utc.iso8601, santiago: local.iso8601, backUtc: back.iso8601 }
end
snippets.C0656:
# C0656 · Regex: extraer emails (Básico, Texto)
def solve(text)
  re = /[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}/i
  out = []
  seen = {}
  text.scan(re) do |m|
    next if seen[m]
    seen[m] = true
    out << m
  end
  out
end

end

snippets.C0661:
# C0661 · Retry + backoff + timeout (Intermedio, Resiliencia)
def solve(max_retries: 5)
  attempt = 0
  delay = 0.2 # seconds
  begin
    attempt += 1
    # do_work()
    raise "fail" if rand < 0.7
    :ok
  rescue => e
    raise e if attempt >= max_retries
    sleep(delay)
    delay = [delay * 2, 5.0].min
    retry
  end
end

snippets.C0665:
# C0665 · Binary search (iterativo) (Básico, Algoritmos)
def solve(arr, target)
  lo = 0
  hi = arr.length - 1
  while lo <= hi
    mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    v = arr[mid]
    return mid if v == target
    if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end
snippets.C0666:
# C0666 · Merge sort (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
def solve(arr)
  return arr if arr.length <= 1
  mid = arr.length / 2
  left = solve(arr[0...mid])
  right = solve(arr[mid..-1])

  out = []
  i = 0
  j = 0
  while i < left.length && j < right.length
    if left[i] <= right[j]
      out << left[i]; i += 1
    else
      out << right[j]; j += 1
    end
  end
  out.concat(left[i..-1] || []).concat(right[j..-1] || [])
end
snippets.C0667:
# C0667 · BFS/DFS (grafo) (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
require "set"

# graph: { "A" => ["B","C"], "B" => ["D"], "C" => [], "D" => [] }

def bfs(graph, start)
  q = [start]
  seen = Set.new([start])
  out = []
  until q.empty?
    v = q.shift
    out << v
    (graph[v] || []).each do |n|
      next if seen.include?(n)
      seen.add(n)
      q << n
    end
  end
  out
end

def dfs(graph, start)
  seen = Set.new
  out = []
  visit = lambda do |v|
    seen.add(v); out << v
    (graph[v] || []).each { |n| visit.call(n) unless seen.include?(n) }
  end
  visit.call(start)
  out
end
snippets.C0668:
# C0668 · A* (pathfinding) (Avanzado, Algoritmos)
# grid: Array<Array<Integer>> 0=free 1=wall
# start/goal: [x,y]
def solve(grid, start, goal)
  w = grid[0].length
  h = grid.length
  hcost = ->(a,b){ (a[0]-b[0]).abs + (a[1]-b[1]).abs }
  key = ->(p){ "#{p[0]},#{p[1]}" }

  neigh = lambda do |p|
    x,y = p
    out = []
    [[1,0],[-1,0],[0,1],[0,-1]].each do |dx,dy|
      nx,ny = x+dx, y+dy
      if nx>=0 && ny>=0 && nx<w && ny<h && grid[ny][nx]==0
        out << [nx,ny]
      end
    end
    out
  end

  open = [[hcost.call(start,goal), start]]
  came = {}
  g = { key.call(start) => 0 }

  until open.empty?
    open.sort_by!{|x| x[0]}
    _, cur = open.shift
    return reconstruct(came, cur) if cur == goal

    neigh.call(cur).each do |nb|
      nk = key.call(nb)
      ng = g[key.call(cur)] + 1
      if !g.key?(nk) || ng < g[nk]
        g[nk] = ng
        came[nk] = cur
        f = ng + hcost.call(nb,goal)
        open << [f, nb]
      end
    end
  end
  []
end

def reconstruct(came, cur)
  key = ->(p){ "#{p[0]},#{p[1]}" }
  path = [cur]
  ck = key.call(cur)
  while came.key?(ck)
    cur = came[ck]
    path << cur
    ck = key.call(cur)
  end
  path.reverse
end

# C0680 · Uso de teclado (keydown/atajos) (Intermedio, UI/Entrada)
# Ruby: stdin (Enter). Para raw mode: io/console.
def solve
  puts "Escribe una tecla y Enter (w/a/s/d, q):"
  while (line = STDIN.gets)
    line = line.strip
    next if line.empty?
    k = line[0].downcase
    break if k == "q"
    puts "Mover: arriba" if k == "w"
    puts "Mover: abajo" if k == "s"
    puts "Mover: izquierda" if k == "a"
    puts "Mover: derecha" if k == "d"
  end
end

# Reloj en consola: actualiza cada segundo (Ctrl+C para salir)
def solve
  loop do
    print "\r" + Time.now.strftime("%H:%M:%S")
    $stdout.flush
    sleep 1
  end
end
